changedFiles.reason: Maintain the active process-correction boundary until ai-finish archives the Work Item.
Maintain the active verification and review record until ai-finish archives the Work Item.
Declare the installer-binding process correction and corrective-release recovery boundary.
Record public failure evidence, TDD, cleanup, verification, and release recovery.
Record the exact base and dedicated Work Item branch.
Name the mandatory installer/source/archive pre-mutation gate explicitly.
Regenerate both installerDigest and the install.sh artifact digest during every release finalization.
Rehash install.sh from the selected source commit and reject stale metadata.
Reject installer drift in preparation mode before the next tag exists.
Treat historical specs like release notes and plans instead of forcing their version examples to track the current release.
Cover installer rejection, both finalizer installer bindings, and real fresh-detached archive parity while consolidating duplicated projection tests.
Cover preparation-time installer digest drift.
Enforce release preflight ordering before tag and publication.
Derive the fixture release tag from release.json instead of an obsolete hard-coded version.
Advance the fixed Quick Install default to corrective release v0.5.40.
Project the corrective v0.5.40 installer and archive contract.
Keep v0.5.41 as the distinct unpublished candidate.
Record canonical v0.5.40/v0.5.41 projection lineage and metadata digests.
Generated candidate freeze identity and deterministic archive evidence.
Generated release artifact digest bindings.
Regenerated candidate SBOM baseline for v0.5.40.
Regenerated candidate provenance with the corrected installer digest.
Document the corrective release and immutable-tag recovery.
Document installer rebinding, preflight, and corrective patch recovery.
Document the same release recovery in Japanese.
Advance the documented published installer ref to v0.5.40.
Advance the Japanese installer ref to v0.5.40.

Generated archive discovery index.
Immutable archive evidence root.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Fix the generator and mandatory pre-mutation gates rather than hand-editing one release projection.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Finalizer generation, exact-source preflight, preparation distribution, and workflow ordering were all corrected and tested.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Hash the exact installer bytes associated with the release source and fail closed on any mismatch.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: check_release_preflight hashes sourceCommit:install.sh; focused tests cover missing, malformed, mismatched, and matching digests.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not rewrite or delete the failed immutable v0.5.39 tag; supersede it with a new corrective patch release after this Work Item closes.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Remote v0.5.39 remains at 841ce411; its GitHub Release is quarantined as Draft and v0.5.40 is prepared without publication.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep archiveGrowth warning-only and do not relax any existing release check.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: No threshold changed; complexity passed at Python 40900, Markdown 9549, with archiveGrowth 542 warning-only.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Use test-driven development and preserve exact-source workflow ordering.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Four focused tests failed before implementation and passed after it; workflow tests keep preflight before all mutations.

risk.detail: Local implementation and preparation evidence pass; hosted PR, exact-main, and final public-distribution verification remain required.

observedIssues: Public v0.5.39 Quick Install verification failed because release.json declared installerDigest 968e4c... while immutable install.sh hashed to a9327066....
The v0.5.39 GitHub Release was moved back to Draft as reversible quarantine; its immutable tag was not changed.
The first full quality run exposed obsolete hard-coded v0.5.39 installer fixtures and historical-spec version scanning; both process paths were corrected.

New release tests initially exceeded Python/Markdown limits and later reduced coverage to 84.83%; duplicated tests and prose were consolidated without raising thresholds, and detached archive coverage was retained until full quality passed at 85.07%.

Independent premerge review found that finalization refreshed release.json but could retain a stale release-digests install.sh artifact; a red-green regression now requires both installer bindings to refresh atomically.

residualRisks.detail: The corrective PR, exact merged main, v0.5.40 workflow, and independent public asset/install audit must still pass before publication is complete.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Finalizer updates installerDigest before release-state and digest projections.
Preflight hashes install.sh from the selected source commit and runs before mutations.
Preparation mode rejects local installer drift.
v0.5.39 remains immutable and quarantined while v0.5.40 is only prepared.
Test consolidation preserves detached archive and release-lineage coverage within existing complexity and coverage limits.

boundaryChecks.runtimeEntrypoints: verified: install.sh defaults to v0.5.40 and release.yml invokes exact-source preflight before mutation
boundaryChecks.userVisibleOutput: verified: preflight and distribution diagnostics name installer digest drift
boundaryChecks.persistence: verified: finalizer writes release.json before release-state and release-digests metadata hashes
boundaryChecks.localization: verified: English and Japanese distribution/install documentation updated together
boundaryChecks.generatedArtifacts: verified: SBOM, provenance, release digests, freeze, state, and release projection generated through repository commands

userCorrectionsCaptured: Repair every workflow or obsolete-code blocker before attempting a release.
Do not use temporary workarounds for release-process defects.
Monitor GitHub Actions after CI starts.
userCorrectionSolidification: Installer identity is now generated and independently validated before mutation, and immutable-tag failure recovery is documented as a corrective patch rather than tag rewriting.
Obsolete version fixtures and historical-spec scanning were corrected; complexity and coverage thresholds were preserved.
knownGaps: PR Actions, merge, ai-close-work-item, exact-main Actions, v0.5.40 publication, and public distribution verification remain pending.
overclaimPrevention: Do not report v0.5.40 published until the immutable tag, non-Draft Release, exact-main Actions, release workflow, assets, and anonymous public distribution all verify the same source.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Stale installerDigest is rejected before tag or GitHub Release mutation.
Finalization rebinds installerDigest after the fixed installer ref changes.
The failed immutable tag remains unchanged while the corrective patch is prepared.
Complexity and coverage remain within existing policy after cleanup.
